label: Brineshade Gravimark Quay
description: Brineshade Gravimark Quay forms a hardened basalt landing frontage cut into the saline flats at the edge of Brineshade’s high-contrast terminator zone. Its approach lanes are scored with luminous gravitic reference marks, aligned to Saltharrow’s pronounced gradients to standardize descent vectors under the star’s hard white radiance. Salt-rimed gantries and sealed mooring pylons rise above mineral haze bands, their surfaces etched by persistent tidal stresses. Shielded service galleries run behind the berth line, built low against wind-scoured flats and engineered for rapid turnover along the system’s charted transit lanes.
